_comment: Static reference pair specs (pip size/lot size/max leverage/margin pct) for a small seed set of liquid FX pairs. Approximate as of file authoring - for offline sizing math only, NOT a live broker margin feed. When phase_v2.ib.enabled and IB is reachable, prefer IB's live margin/leverage over these static numbers (documented future enhancement, not implemented in this pass) - this file is the offline/backtest/IB-disabled fallback risk/forex_risk.py::load_forex_pair_specs() reads. leverage_max/margin_pct move with regulatory regime (US retail forex is capped far lower than this file's defaults, which assume a non-US-regulated account) and will drift from these numbers over time; refresh by hand periodically.
